title: TruthHire: Employment-Fraud Screening System (Reference Implementation)
description: Deployable, API-first employment-fraud screening system built around a deterministic, explainable timeline-impossibility engine with a granularity-aware overlap rule, plus a pluggable OSINT signal layer (offline by default, live-ready). Includes additive risk scoring with severity bands; a privacy-preserving shared fraud network (SHA-256 hashes only) with threshold cross-organization lookup and fraud-ring detection; an outcome-symmetric contribution-credit ledger; Stripe-ready billing and plans; ATS adapters; bulk CSV screening; a self-contained results dashboard; AI skills-consistency scoring; an audit/dispute/adverse-action governance layer; request-timing metrics and health probes; and real SQL persistence (SQLAlchemy + Alembic migrations, SQLite by default, Postgres-ready). Outputs are advisory and human-in-the-loop by design. Ships with a full pytest suite.
